figures.caption: Figure 1. (a) Experimental dispersions of magnetic excitations of SrIr1−xSnxO3. (b) Simulated dispersions by LSWT. The in-phase pair and out-of-phase pair are represented by the solid and dashed lines respectively.
Figure 2. (a)-(e) LSWT fit to the experimental dispersions of SrIr1−xSnxO3 with x = 0, 0.03, 0.06, 0.1 and 0.2.
Figure 3. Evolution of the leading effective exchange interaction Jin with spin-dilution ratio x. The spin-dilution scaling law Jeff(x) = J0(1− 2x) is shown by the gray line.
